evals.name: generate-footer-test
evals.prompt: write playwright tests from the test plan
evals.expected_output: Generates tests/check-all-rights-reserve-in-the-homepage-footer.spec.ts for the footer test case. Skips check-logo-in-homepage.spec.ts because it already exists. Uses playwright-cli to explore the site. Spec uses semantic locators and toHaveText for the copyright text.

assertions.name: footer-spec-file-generated
assertions.description: A file named check-all-rights-reserve-in-the-homepage-footer.spec.ts was created in tests/

assertions.name: correct-playwright-imports
assertions.description: Generated file contains: import { test, expect } from '@playwright/test';

assertions.name: has-test-case-tbd-comment
assertions.description: Generated file contains a comment starting with // Test Case TBD

assertions.name: navigates-to-correct-url
assertions.description: Generated file contains page.goto with https://casacolinacare-com.vercel.app

assertions.name: checks-copyright-text
assertions.description: Generated file uses toHaveText or toBeVisible to assert the copyright text 'Casa Colina Care LLC. All rights reserved.'

assertions.name: uses-semantic-locators
assertions.description: Generated file uses getByRole, getByText, or similar semantic locators — not raw CSS selectors or XPath

assertions.name: logo-test-skipped
assertions.description: Skill output indicates check-logo-in-homepage was skipped because file already exists

evals.name: idempotency-check
evals.prompt: write playwright tests from the test plan
evals.expected_output: Both test cases are skipped because their spec files already exist. No new files created. Skill reports that all tests were already generated.

assertions.name: no-new-files-created
assertions.description: No new spec files were written to tests/

assertions.name: both-reported-as-skipped
assertions.description: Output indicates both check-logo-in-homepage and check-all-rights-reserve-in-the-homepage-footer were skipped
